subcodes.title: Words to departing pilgrims, spoken on 1914-04-28
subcodes.first_line: In this century the voices of peace must drown the clamors for battle, and the principle of arbitration must gain sway
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @war and peace, @education of children; moral education, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
